DROP TABLE [OUT].[OUT_PM_NEAREST_NEIGHBOUR]
GO

SET ANSI_NULLS ON
GO
SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER ON
GO

CREATE TABLE [OUT].[OUT_PM_NEAREST_NEIGHBOUR]
( 
	[SequenceNo] INT IDENTITY(1,1) NOT NULL,
	[OperatingCompany] [nvarchar](max)  NULL,
	[StreetNumber] [nvarchar](max)  NULL,
	[StreetName] [nvarchar](max)  NULL,
	[Address1] [nvarchar](max)  NULL,
	[City] [nvarchar](max)  NULL,
	[State] [nvarchar](max)  NULL,
	[Zip] [nvarchar](max)  NULL,
	[Market] [nvarchar](max)  NULL,
	[Overall_Remodeling_Composite_Ranking_Index] [decimal](10,2)  NULL,
	[Baths_Composite_Ranking_Index] [decimal](10,2)  NULL,
	[Windows_Composite_Ranking_Index] [decimal](10,2)  NULL,
	[SoldToNeighbour_CustomerID] [nvarchar](max)  NULL,
	[SoldToNeighbour_EntryDate] [datetime2](7)  NULL,
	[SoldToNeighbour_GSA] [decimal](19,4)  NULL,
	[LastUpdateTS]  [datetime2](7)  NULL
)
WITH
(
	DISTRIBUTION = ROUND_ROBIN,
	HEAP
)
GO
